summary: FINAL comprehensive regression test of all Emanator E1 fixes. All 10 features tested and PASSED: health endpoint, login flow, dashboard tabs, project hub, chat stream, no canvasUpdated errors, no task mode violations, follow-up messages work, preview renders multi-file projects, Core System tab accessible.
critical_code_review_comments: canvasUpdated correctly scoped at line 1198 in message-stream.js outer function scope
resolveTaskMode defaults to 'build' at line 320-326 in intents.js
INSPECT_MODE_PATTERNS tightened at lines 574-584 in intents.js
READ_ONLY_PATTERNS tightened at lines 349-353 in intents.js
PreviewTab.jsx pre-registers component names as lazy wrappers at lines 423-435
Dashboard.jsx refactored with useSandboxOps.js (178 lines) and useMediaBin.js (98 lines) hooks
context_for_next_testing_agent: All E1 fixes verified working in comprehensive regression test. No issues found.

login_flow.details: Login with testprov@test.com / password123 successful, redirects to dashboard

dashboard_tabs.details: Dashboard loads with Projects tab, Archived tab, Core System tab, Start Building button

project_hub.details: Project Hub shows Quick Actions (New Chat, Creative Brief, Upload to Media Bin), CONVERSATIONS sidebar, DETAILS panel, MEDIA BIN section

chat_stream.details: Chat stream endpoint works - AI generates project with milestones: Reading mind, Plotting game plan, Summoning brain, Gathering ingredients, Rummaging files, Painting visuals, Artwork ready, Generating project

no_canvasUpdated_errors.details: No 'canvasUpdated is not defined' errors in console - variable correctly scoped at line 1198

no_task_mode_violations.details: No 'Task mode violation: inspect mode must not produce file_actions' errors

followup_messages_work.details: Follow-up message 'proceed' sent successfully, AI responded: 'Sure thing! Here's what I'll do next: 1. Enhance interactivity by adding a simple contact form. 2. Implement a basic client-side validation for the form. 3. Ensure all components remain visually consistent with the current design. Let's dive in.'

preview_renders_multifile.details: Preview tab renders multi-file project without ReferenceError - shows TestRegression app with Navbar (Features, About, Contact, Get Started), Hero section, Discover More button

core_system_tab.details: Core System Workspace loads with conversations: 'Core System' (19h ago), 'Self-Edit: Internal Improvement' (19h ago)

canvasUpdated_scoping.fix: let canvasUpdated = false declared in outer function scope

inspect_mode_patterns.fix: INSPECT_MODE_PATTERNS tightened to not catch app descriptions

preview_lazy_wrappers.fix: Pre-registration of component names as lazy wrappers on window before first compilation

dashboard_hooks_extraction.fix: Extracted sandbox operations (178 lines) and media bin operations (98 lines) from Dashboard.jsx
